# Toot

This is the _Typst Opinionated Online Tutorial_ for _\[name of package\]_.

If you haven't already, install the `toot-builder` CLI via
```sh
julia -e 'import Pkg; Pkg.Apps.add(url="https://codeberg.org/a5s/toot")'
```
You can then build the website via
```sh
toot-builder build
```
or serve a live version via
```sh
toot-builder serve
```

For further details, see [here](https://typst.app/universe/package/toot).
